original_snippet_context: Report on the financial market in Rio, seemingly discussing exchange rates.
relevant_quote: O mercado abriu com os bancos sacando a 15 1|16, letras a 15 3|4 e compradores a 15 13|16.
justification: This snippet provides market data (exchange rates) without expressing any opinion on the "Caixa de Conversão" itself or related policies. While the rates mentioned might be relevant to the context of the monetary debates, the text itself is purely descriptive.
